html:
Exclusive to:

The Cork Barrel is a craftable Structure exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It has 4 storage slots, and cannot be opened by Pogs. They also cannot be opened by Splumonkeys and Krampus cannot break them or steal items from them, although Slurtles will still pull Rocks out of them and Bearger can still break them to search for food.

Trivia

  • According to Willow's quote, this item is not flammable, even though it is.

Gallery

  • A burnt Cork Barrel.
  • The old icon for the Cork Barrel.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

“A pest protector.”
–Wilson
“It doesn't burn but it does keep the pests out.”
–Willow
“Is for keeping little doggies out.”
–Wolfgang
“Can I fill it with my soul?”
–Wendy
“VIRUS PROTECTION INSTALLED”
–WX-78
“It should keep the vermin out.”
–Wickerbottom
“No pests are getting in there.”
–Woodie
“At least this'll keep those nosy critters out.”
–Maxwell
“A small container constructed of a lightweight material.”
–Wagstaff
“It hölds my stuff!”
–Wigfrid
“Now nothing can get our stuff!”
–Webber
“Should keep my stuff all corked up safe.”
–Walani

–Woodlegs
“MINE TEENY TREASURE!”
–Wilba
“Put stuff inside”
–Wormwood
“Pretty small but I'm desperate for storage space.”
–Wheeler
The Cork Barrel is a craftable Structure exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It has 4 storage slots, and cannot be opened by Pogs. They also cannot be opened by Splumonkeys and Krampus cannot break them or steal items from them, although Slurtles will still pull Rocks out of them and Bearger can still break them to search for food.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
According to Willow's quote, this item is not flammable, even though it is.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Thùng Nút Chai là một Kiến Trúc chế tạo được dành riêng cho Hamlet DLC. Nó có 4 khe chứa đồ và Pogs không thể mở được. Chúng cũng không thể được mở bởi Khỉ Hang và Krampus không thể phá vỡ chúng hoặc cướp đồ từ chúng, mặc dù Sên Rùa vẫn sẽ kéo Đá ra khỏi chúng và Bearger vẫn có thể đập vỡ chúng để tìm kiếm thức ăn.

The '''Cork Barrel''' is a craftable [[Structures|Structure]] exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It has 4 storage slots, and cannot be opened by [[Pog]]s. They also cannot be opened by [[Splumonkey|Splumonkeys]] and [[Krampus]] cannot break them or steal items from them, although [[Slurtle|Slurtles]] will still pull Rocks out of them and [[Bearger]] can still break them to search for food.

== {{Pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* According to [[Willow]]'s quote, this item is not flammable, even though it is.
